channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: AI might run your next employee training
item.description: It’s almost become cliche for employers to express concern about Gen Z’s lack of training in the social skills necessary for life in the office.
item.dc:creator: Steven Melendez, Fast Company

item.title: Elon Musk’s China ties make a bad situation worse
item.description: In the first weeks of Donald Trump’s second term in office, Elon Musk has been busy seizing control of instruments of government power, causing many to wonder who is really in charge. “Elon Musk is President,” The Atlantic’s Jonathan Lemire declared. “There has never been a private citizen like him.
item.dc:creator: Scott Nover, Fast Company

item.title: VC-backed startup accused of gouging Los Angeles fire victims on rent
item.description: Blueground US Inc. illegally jacked up rents for furnished apartments in Los Angeles — more than 50% in one example — after last month’s wildfires that destroyed thousands of homes, the city attorney’s office alleged in a lawsuit.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Google removes weapons development, surveillance pledges from AI ethics policy
item.description: Google has updated its ethical policies on artificial intelligence, eliminating a pledge to not use AI technology for weapons development and surveillance.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Fast fashion, laptops and toys are likely to cost more due to US tariffs on Chinese imports
item.description: A sweeping new U.S. tariff on products made in China is expected to increase the prices American consumers pay for a wide array of products, from the ultra-cheap apparel sold on online shopping platforms to toys and electronic devices such as computers and cellphones.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: China targets Apple’s business practices; maybe the company should adapt
item.description: They say great art reflects its time. When it comes to Apple’s business, just as the iMac and iPod matched the zeitgeist, the company must now develop its business to meet the complex demands of a divided, post-globalist world struggling with economic and climate insecurity.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Panasonic may leave the TV business, and that would be a crying shame
item.description: Japanese electronics manufacturer Panasonic is considering a sale of its TV business, only a year after it re-entered the US market.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Adobe's AI assistant can now decipher contract jargon in your PDFs
item.description: Acrobat AI Assistant can now handle contracts to make sure you don’t miss important details obscured in complex language.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: The Google Pixel 9a freebies have seemingly leaked, but there’s one notable omission
item.description: The Google Pixel 9a might come with a trio of free subscriptions, but could miss out on an AI upgrade.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: AI chatbot war breaks out with DeepSeek debut, and the winner is…you
item.description: Less than a week after Chinese start-up DeepSeek rocked the tech industry, leading generative AI (genAI) model providers are scrambling to shore up their market foothold and find ways to emulate the newcomer’s tech efficiencies.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: DeepSeek's rise raises data privacy, national security concerns
item.description: The emergence of a newly popular artificial intelligence (AI) model from Chinese startup DeepSeek is raising national security and data privacy concerns for the U.S., not unlike those that spurred a ban on TikTok last month.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Data Lakehouse Provider Databricks Acquires BladeBridge to Ease Legacy Data Warehouse Migration
item.description: Databricks acquires data platform modernization software provider BladeBridge to help customers migrate from rival data warehouses, such as Teradata and Snowflake.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Apple lashes out at iPhone porn app maker and the EU rules allowing its download
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Apple has chided a newly introduced pornography app available in the European Union, warning that the bloc’s digital rules opening the way for third-party app store downloads undermines consumer confidence in the tech giant.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Robinhood halts Super Bowl betting contracts after CFTC request
item.description: Robinhood said on Tuesday it is rolling back the event contracts that would let users bet on the result of the Super Bowl clash this weekend, after the online brokerage received a request from the U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC).
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Judge says Elon Musk's claims of harm from OpenAI are a 'stretch' but welcomes possible trial
item.description: OAKLAND, Calif. (AP) — Elon Musk's lawyers faced off with OpenAI in court Tuesday as a federal judge weighed the billionaire's request for a court order that would block the ChatGPT maker from converting itself to a for-profit company. U.S.
item.dc:creator: BARBARA ORTUTAY and MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Twitch has plenty of competition in the livestream economy. CEO Dan Clancy isn’t worried
item.description: Business leaders are often reluctant to speak about their competition. It’s rare that you’ll hear Netflix’s Ted Sarandos talk about Disney+, or Skims’s Jens Grede speak about Spanx. It’s uncouth and unhelpful, a good PR will tell you.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: Linux containers in 2025 and beyond
item.description: The use of Linux containers has shown no sign of slowing down since their emergence in the early 1980s.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Texas governor orders ban on DeepSeek, RedNote for government devices
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Texas Republican Gov. Greg Abbott issued a ban on Chinese artificial intelligence company DeepSeek for government-issued devices, becoming the first state to restrict the popular chatbot in such a manner.
item.dc:creator: NADIA LATHAN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: VMware offers fixes to severe vulnerabilities in VMware Aria
item.description: VMware has fixed multiple high-severity vulnerabilities affecting its cloud management platform (CMP), VMware Aria, which could allow attackers to steal sensitive credentials from the virtualization giant’s IT management and logging solutions.
item.dc:creator: csoonline

item.title: US cybersecurity agency's future role in elections remains murky under the Trump administration
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The nation’s cybersecurity agency has played a critical role in helping states shore up the defenses of their voting systems, but its election mission appears uncertain amid sustained criticism from Republicans and key figures in the Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTINA A. CASSIDY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Amazon sues state agency to block release of company records to Bezos-owned Washington Post
item.description: Amazon is suing a Washington state agency to prevent the release of some company materials to The Washington Post, the newspaper which is owned by Amazon founder Jeff Bezos.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Industry Exchange Cyber 2025: Zimperium’s Kern Smith on why securing mobile devices doesn’t necessarily mean locking them down
item.description: With the right continuous monitoring of mobile activity and apps, agencies can avoid restrictive device policies, advises Zimperium’s solutions engineering VP.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: Warehouse robot uses AI to play real-life Tetris to handle more than ever before
item.description: A multipurpose robotic system promises to transform how items are stacked onto pallets, aiming to maximize space utilization and reduce shipping costs.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
